schema.description: Brain self-merge graduation log. cheap-agent-fleet.mdc rule + WS-44.

tier_definitions.data-only: merges only paths matching apis/brain/data/**, docs/**, .cursor/rules/**
tier_definitions.brain-code: merges paths under apis/brain/** (graduation requires N=50 clean data-only merges)
tier_definitions.app-code: merges paths under apis/<other>/, apps/, packages/ (graduation requires N=50 clean brain-code merges)
